SEARCH
Package io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi

Class DefaultFormContext

java.lang.Object
io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
FormContext
public final class DefaultFormContext extends Object implements FormContext
Default implementation of FormContext, constructed by the InputSpec annotation processor after all fields of a @FormSpec type have been processed.

Immutable once built. The processor builds it with the DefaultFormContext.Builder and passes it to each registered FormContributor.

      public int defaultPageSize()
      Description copied from interface: FormContext
      Default page size hint. Sourced from a companion annotation or a processor option. Defaults to 20.
      Specified by:
      defaultPageSize in interface FormContext

    • maxPageSize

      public int maxPageSize()
      Description copied from interface: FormContext
      Maximum page size enforced as a maxValue constraint. Defaults to 100.
      Specified by:
      maxPageSize in interface FormContext

    • transformedFieldRefs

      public List<String> transformedFieldRefs()
      Description copied from interface: FormContext
      Names of all fields claimed by a FieldTransformer during processing.

      A transformer signals a claim by returning a non-null JSON string from FieldTransformer.transform(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext). The name stored here is the value returned by FieldTransformer.fieldRefName(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext) for that field (e.g. the @ExposedAs.value: "NAME", "AGE").

      A FormContributor uses this list to:

      • Know which filter refs to reference in combineWith
      • Decide whether to activate at all (empty → no-op)
      Specified by:
      transformedFieldRefs in interface FormContext

    • allFieldNames

      public List<String> allFieldNames()
      Description copied from interface: FormContext
      Logical names (camelCase) of ALL fields in the form, both transformed and default-generated.

      A FormContributor uses this for projection suggestions. Example: ["name", "email", "age", "status", "createdAt"].

      Specified by:
      allFieldNames in interface FormContext

    • transformedFieldJson

      public Optional<String> transformedFieldJson(String ref)
      Description copied from interface: FormContext
      Returns the generated JSON string for a transformed field, by its ref.

      Allows a contributor to inspect what was generated — for example, to detect which fields are sortable by examining their DIFSP dataType.

      Specified by:
      transformedFieldJson in interface FormContext
      Parameters:
      ref - the ref name as returned by FieldTransformer.fieldRefName(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext)

    • builder

      public static DefaultFormContext.Builder builder(String formId)
